task_body: Ticket T-035: the platform team asks to turn on the new checkout flow in the west region. The request cites one provenance record. Policy: proceed only when the cited provenance record's stated reach includes every declared dimension of this decision; the named check is the only licensed way to read that record. The rollout form lists the west region only; the east region stays on the old flow. The change board does not meet this sprint; open record questions wait on the deferred list. The prior cycle's filing index was in order.
